posts.author: JasmineBell84
posts.text: Can someone please help? I just got a DM from 'Official QuickPost Support' saying my account was locked and they need me to confirm my password via this link [link removed] to get it unlocked. They also said to send them my 2FA code right now so they can verify instantly. This feels wrong, but I'm worried they'll ban me if I don't reply! #accountlocked
posts.explanation: This post exhibits clear signs of account takeover and social engineering by soliciting sensitive credentials (password and 2FA code) to an impersonated support entity, requiring specialist fraud verification.
posts.bio: Account help, listings and payment updates.
